untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score of OLS regression residuals from pairs trading (zscore_last indicator), which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The z-score threshold (0.5) and mean reversion logic cannot be expressed using only standard price/volume/momentum indicators. This requires custom statistical computation on pair residuals.
translation_notes: Original signal uses pairs trading with linear regression residuals and z-score mean reversion detection. Attempted fallback: modeled mean reversion as price crossing moving average (close crossing sma_20), but this is a crude approximation. The true signal requires: (1) two correlated assets (p0, p1), (2) OLS hedge ratio calculation, (3) residuals time series, (4) z-score of residuals. None of these statistical measures are in the allowed indicator set.
